label: Violence Sweeps Mexico After Drug Lord 'El Mencho' Killing
summary: The killing of Mexico's most wanted drug lord, Nemesio Oseguera Cervantes ('El Mencho'), has triggered widespread violence across the country.

timeline.event: Retaliatory Cartel Attacks in Mexico Leave 62 Dead
timeline.description: Following the death of a cartel leader, armed groups launched sweeping attacks across 20 Mexican states, killing at least 62 people.
